title: Positive flow: Select all TV services and confirm
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Select all checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: All TV services are confirmed as selected

title: Negative flow: Unselect all TV services and confirm
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Unselect all checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: All TV services are confirmed as unselected

title: Negative flow: Unselect some TV services and confirm
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Unselect some checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: Some TV services are confirmed as unselected

title: Negative flow: Unselect all TV services and try to confirm
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Unselect all checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all TV services must be selected

title: Negative flow: Select some TV services and try to confirm
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Select some checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all TV services must be selected

title: Negative flow: Select all TV services and try to unselect some
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Select all checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Unselect some checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all TV services must be selected

title: Negative flow: Select some TV services and try to unselect all
preconditions: User is logged in and on the TV channel selection screen
test_steps: Navigate to the TV channel selection screen | Select some checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Unselect all checkboxes next to the TV service providers | Click on the blue button 'TAK, TO MOJE KANAŁY'
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all TV services must be selected
